description: Detects discarded return values from functions whose return value indicates success/failure. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes appearing as expression_statement without filtering by dangerous function name or severity graduation. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Function call return value discarded -- verify this is intentional. fopen(), open(), socket() return NULL/negative on failure (error). fwrite(), fread(), read(), write(), recv(), send(), connect(), bind(), listen(), accept(), pthread_create() return partial counts or error codes that must be checked.
